criteria.criterion: Compacting tickets recorded as cli, mcp, python, jira, and import writes the exact channel into SNAPSHOT.data.compiled_state, retires the source CREATE, and SNAPSHOT-only replay returns the same value without an inference marker. Prove with uv run pytest -q tests/interfaces/lifecycle/test_creation_channel_compaction.py -k recorded.

Compacting an inferred historical Jira ticket materializes creation_channel=jira and creation_channel_inferred=true in compiled_state; SNAPSHOT-only replay preserves both. Prove with uv run pytest -q tests/interfaces/lifecycle/test_creation_channel_compaction.py -k inferred.

A pre-feature SNAPSHOT with creation_channel absent, None, or provisional unknown-without-marker projects inferred Jira only for the exact three-signal predicate and otherwise unknown; concrete recorded channels plus already-inferred Jira bypass re-inference. Prove with uv run pytest -q tests/scripts/reducer/test_reducer_snapshot.py -k creation_channel.

creation_channel and creation_channel_inferred never appear on the SNAPSHOT envelope and are not removed by _snapshot_strip_keys. Prove with uv run pytest -q tests/interfaces/lifecycle/test_creation_channel_compaction.py -k placement.

rebuild_snapshot_from_full_log plus conservative-horizon compaction preserve the same provenance while later live events replay normally. A simulated old-style SNAPSHOT missing creation_channel is detected and repaired from its retained CREATE through the existing fsck --repair-snapshots seam. Prove with uv run pytest -q tests/interfaces/lifecycle/test_creation_channel_compaction.py -k 'rebuild or horizon or rollback_recovery' && uv run pytest -q tests/integration/test_concurrency_regression.py.

Existing snapshot consistency, rollback recovery, and forward-compat behavior remain green. Prove with uv run pytest -q tests/interfaces/lifecycle/test_compact_rollback_recovery.py tests/interfaces/store/test_fsck_snapshot_checks.py tests/interfaces/contracts/test_event_schema_forward_compat.py.

As final documentation integrator, verify docs/event-schema.md plus docs/output-schemas.md jointly cover the enum, Jira inference, import semantics, SNAPSHOT placement, actor/environment/source_* distinctions, plus the diagnostic trust boundary. docs/concurrency.md covers rollback states, the compact pause, affected-ID capture, plus full-log rebuild. Prove with uv run pytest -q tests/interfaces/contracts/test_schema_outputs.py tests/interfaces/contracts/test_schema_coverage.py && make lint.
